title: scr1 test suite: processing passes get stuck, and allocate huge amounts of system RAM when verilog contains memory blocks

features.name: unpacked array with parameter-driven size and replication literal assignment
features.description: Code should include a large unpacked array declaration with parameter-driven size, assigned using an array literal with replication operator

features.name: array literal with large replication count
features.description: Code should include an array literal that uses replication with a large replication count (exceeding 256) causing blowup
